items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: Use the online Square booking link to choose a time and reserve your appointment.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: East Quarter Barber is at 2201 Main St, Dallas, TX 75201, USA.

items.question: Is there a team I can choose from?
items.answer: Yes. The verified team entries in the booking information include Miquel, Steve, Tesst, test, and testt.

items.question: What if I need to call first?
items.answer: You can reach the shop at (469) 274-3587.

items.question: Do you have reviews?
items.answer: The shop is rated 5.0 from 266 reviews on Google.

items.question: Can I get directions?
items.answer: Yes. Use the Google Maps link or the directions button to navigate to the shop.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: Please use the booking page to view the current service options available at East Quarter Barber.

items.question: Do you have social links?
items.answer: No public social links were supplied in the source data.

paragraphs: East Quarter Barber appears in the supplied booking data as a downtown Dallas barber shop at 2201 Main St, with appointments handled through Square.
The visible website copy stays focused on the practical details: the address, booking link, phone number, and verified team entries available in the source data.

standard.title: The East Quarter
paragraphs: A better appointment starts with clear information and an easy way to book.
The site is designed to help you find the shop, contact the team, and plan your visit.
